title: Queen vs Pawn
description: Stop an advanced pawn with checks, force the king in front of it, and approach with your king.

solution.pgn:
[SetUp "1"]
[FEN "8/8/K7/8/8/1Q6/4p3/4k3 w - - 0 1"]
[Result "*"]

1. Qe3 Kf1 2. Qf3+ Ke1 3. Kb5 Kd2 4. Qg2 Ke3 5. Qg5+ Kf2 6. Qf4+ Kg2 *
solution.explanation: Alternate checks and control of the promotion square, using each forced king move to bring your own king closer.
